stemHtml: How can you accelerate the exhaust gas velocity to generate more thrust, assuming the exhaust gas becomes supersonic?

options.a: Through a convergent-divergent nozzle, which consists of a convergent section followed by a divergent section.
options.b: Through a convergent section with swirls that generate a turbulent exhaust flow.
options.c: By using a noise suppressor to manage the exhaust flow.
options.d: By employing a divergent section placed after the turbine section.
